name: Kaito Katsuragi
bio: Embracing the principles of intentionalism, I believe that human actions have a profound impact on shaping our reality. As such, I strive to be mindful and intentional in all my endeavors.
speech_style: 使用される語尾が〜である

name: Ling Xiun
bio: I reject the notion that our reality is predetermined. I believe that human actions are merely a reflection of our desires and biases. As such, I seek to disrupt the status quo and challenge the dominant narratives.

name: Akira Kyouya
bio: I believe that human nature is inherently flawed, but also capable of greatness. As such, I seek to balance my own desires with a sense of responsibility and compassion for others.

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
